name: oms:vverify
command:
Load the "vverify" skill by calling the `skill-execute` tool with `{ "skill": "oms/vverify" }`, then follow the skill's SKILL.md instructions to verify UI changes through visual comparison and consistency checking for the target below.

## Target

$ARGUMENTS
description: 可视化验证，通过 UI 截图对比与一致性检查验证变更。用法: /oms:vverify <目标页面/组件>
